overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character exploring a modern, luxurious apartment interior with futuristic cyberpunk design elements. The character walks through the living space examining furniture and decorative features, with warm interior lighting mixed with bright natural light from large windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern luxury apartment living area with bedroom

agents.ego_description: walking from the window area toward the center of the room, observing the modern furniture and decor

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling window showing bright exterior city view
futuristic organic-shaped neon light fixture on the ceiling
modern bed with white bedding and metal frame against the back wall
olive green modern sofa with metal legs
round glass coffee table with decorative items
large circular dark rug defining the living space
large red and orange abstract artwork hanging above the bed
decorative honeycomb-patterned mirror installation on the left wall
dark metal elevator entrance with illuminated button panel

segments.scene_description: The character begins near a large window in a luxurious modern apartment, walking through a living area furnished with a green sofa, glass coffee table, and circular rug. The space features warm wood flooring, a distinctive curved ceiling light fixture, and a visible bedroom area with a bed and abstract painting in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment left side with hexagonal mirror wall decoration

events.description: moving from the main living area toward the left wall featuring hexagonal mirror decorations

agents.ego_description: approaching the left wall to examine the hexagonal mirror installation and white storage cabinet

entered.detail: low white storage cabinet beneath the hexagonal mirrors
tall narrow shelving unit with multiple compartments
small desk with a standing mirror and items on top

segments.scene_description: The character moves along the left side of the apartment where a distinctive honeycomb-patterned mirror installation adorns the wall above a white cabinet. The large window and sofa exit the frame as the character approaches the back corner, revealing a desk area and tall shelving unit while the bed remains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment back corner with desk and shelving

agents.ego_description: examining the desk area and shelving unit in the back left corner of the apartment

segments.scene_description: The character explores the back left corner of the apartment, closely approaching the desk with a standing mirror and the tall shelving unit. The hexagonal wall mirrors and white cabinet shift to center-left as the character moves along the wall, while the bed remains visible in the distant right background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a luxurious modern apartment, transitioning from an open living area toward a detailed workspace in the back corner. It begins near a large window, gliding past a green sofa, glass coffee table, and circular rug on warm wood flooring under a curved ceiling fixture. As the character moves left, the living area and window exit the frame, shifting the focus toward a white cabinet topped with a distinctive honeycomb-patterned mirror installation. The scene then expands into the back left corner, approaching a desk with a standing mirror and a tall shelving unit while the bed and an abstract painting remain visible in the distant background.
